examples: He just drank himself jovially into oblivion.
Simply pour him a drink and he'll jovially clink glasses with you, before downing the liquid in a single manly gulp.
"Just what the spin doctor ordered, " was how veteran Sixty Minutes correspondent Charles Wooley jovially introduced his scoop.
In occasional conversations, some on his page, some in private messages, he taught me about cinematography, he jovially explained the meaning of the military expression "Hua!"
